# Twisted Pin

> Bar-led venue in Plainfield, IL. The cocktail program was curated by Brian Van Flandern (named America's Top Mixologist by Food Network). 28-tap self-serve beer and wine wall — the only one in the immediate area. 17 traditional bowling lanes plus a 6-lane VIP suite. Adults-first, group-friendly, family-welcome.

Twisted Pin is a hospitality venue at 15610 S Joliet Rd, Plainfield, IL — minutes from Naperville, Bolingbrook, and Romeoville. The website leads with the bar program; bowling is acknowledged as a feature, not the primary offering. The 6-lane VIP suite (set apart from the traditional lanes by a wall, semi-private) is the venue's distinct group-event differentiator vs. chain competitors like Bowlero or Lucky Strike. Reserve 2, 4, or 6 lanes; up to 80 people when the whole suite is taken over.

## Pillars

- [Bar program](https://www.twistedpin.com/bar/): Cocktails curated by Brian Van Flandern (America's Top Mixologist) plus 28-tap self-serve beer and wine wall.
- [Eat](https://www.twistedpin.com/eat/): Chef-inspired plates built to share, paired with the bar program.
- [Bowl](https://www.twistedpin.com/bowl/): 17 traditional lanes plus a 6-lane VIP suite. Open bowling almost any time; reservations for busy nights.
- [VIP Suite](https://www.twistedpin.com/vip-suite/): Six lanes set apart from the traditional lanes — semi-private, yours when you take the whole suite. Up to 80 people. Adult birthdays, corporate offsites, holiday parties, staff appreciation, graduation parties, gender reveals, bridal showers, reception dinners.
- [Group Events](https://www.twistedpin.com/events/): Birthdays, corporate, fundraisers, family events. Run a tab or hand out drink tickets.
- [Game / Arcade](https://www.twistedpin.com/game/): Skee-ball, redemption games, crane machines.

## Menus

- [Cocktails menu](https://www.twistedpin.com/menu/cocktails/)
- [Tap list](https://www.twistedpin.com/menu/taps/) — 28 self-serve taps, beer and wine, paid by the ounce.
- [Food menu](https://www.twistedpin.com/menu/food/)
- [Menu hub](https://www.twistedpin.com/menu/)

## Reference

- [Pricing](https://www.twistedpin.com/pricing/) — walk-in pricing by day, with specials.
- [FAQ](https://www.twistedpin.com/faq/) — hours, lanes, pricing, reservations, VIP suite, gift cards, events.
- [Hours and contact](https://www.twistedpin.com/#find-us) — live hours from Google Business Profile, address, phone, directions.
- [Leagues](https://www.twistedpin.com/leagues/) — USBC-sanctioned mixed leagues serving Will County (Plainfield, Joliet, Romeoville, Naperville, Shorewood, Lockport, Crest Hill).
- [Fundraisers](https://www.twistedpin.com/fundraisers/) — 50% of bowling, shoe, and arcade revenue back to host organizations on Thursday nights, 5-9pm. Main floor only (not the VIP suite).
- [Free Summer Bowling for Kids](https://www.twistedpin.com/free-kids-bowling/) — June 1-30, weekdays 11am-4pm, 2 games/day. Hyperlocal: Naperville, Romeoville, Shorewood, Bolingbrook, Oswego, Joliet.

## Programs and seasonal

- [Upcoming events](https://www.twistedpin.com/upcoming-events/) — public event calendar (lookahead window: 60 days).
- [New Year's Eve](https://www.twistedpin.com/new-years-eve/) — annual NYE event.
- [Rewards](https://www.twistedpin.com/rewards/) — front-desk kiosk loyalty program, 50 points per visit, 5-tier ladder.
- [Coupon](https://www.twistedpin.com/coupon/) — $10 lane credit signup.
- [Waitlist](https://www.twistedpin.com/waitlist/) — TablesReady-powered live waitlist.
- [Gift cards](https://www.twistedpin.com/gift-cards/) — in-store at the front desk, valid for bowling and arcade.

## Plan an event

Group events (birthdays, corporate, fundraisers) book through [Zite](https://twistedevents.zite.so/). Standard bowling reservations book through [Roller](https://ecom.roller.app/twistedpin/openbowl/en-us/home).
